svg.style: background: transparent; background-color: transparent; color-scheme: light dark;
svg.content:
<mxfile host="Electron" agent="Mozilla/5.0 (X11; Linux aarch64) AppleWebKit/537.36 (KHTML, like Gecko) draw.io/29.6.1 Chrome/142.0.7444.265 Electron/39.8.0 Safari/537.36" version="29.6.1"> <diagram id="ltSDcRX4zmrUS0tvctzg" name="pageWithNumber"> <mxGraphModel dx="-524" dy="-202" grid="0" gridSize="10" guides="1" tooltips="1" connect="1" arrows="1" fold="0" page="0" pageScale="1" pageWidth="850" pageHeight="1100" math="0" shadow="0" adaptiveColors="auto"> <root> <mxCell id="0" /> <mxCell id="1" parent="0" /> <mxCell id="title" parent="1" style="text;html=1;strokeColor=none;fillColor=none;align=center;verticalAlign=middle;whiteSpace=wrap;rounded=0;fontSize=15;fontStyle=1;" value="CQRS + Event Sourcing — Application Flow" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="40" width="840" x="80" y="20" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="cmd" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffe6cc;strokeColor=#d6b656;fontSize=12;" value="Command" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="50" width="130" x="80" y="110" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="cmd_handler" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffe6cc;strokeColor=#d6b656;fontSize=12;" value="Command Handler" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="50" width="150" x="270" y="110" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="aggregate" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#f8cecc;strokeColor=#b85450;fontSize=12;" value="Aggregate
(Applies Business Rules)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="65" width="175" x="480" y="100" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="domain_events" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#e1d5e7;strokeColor=#9673a6;fontSize=11;" value="Domain Events
(OrderPlaced, PaymentProcessed...)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="60" width="215" x="460" y="240" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="event_store" parent="1" style="shape=cylinder3;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#e1d5e7;strokeColor=#9673a6;size=10;fontSize=12;" value="Event Store
(Append-only log)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="70" width="175" x="480" y="370" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="projector" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dae8fc;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;fontSize=12;" value="Projection Engine
(Event Handler)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="65" width="165" x="730" y="370" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="read_store" parent="1" style="shape=cylinder3;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#d5e8d4;strokeColor=#82b366;size=10;fontSize=12;" value="Read Model Store
(Denormalized Views)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="70" width="145" x="740" y="510" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="qry_handler" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#d5e8d4;strokeColor=#82b366;fontSize=12;" value="Query Handler" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="50" width="145" x="740" y="650" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="dto" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#d5e8d4;strokeColor=#82b366;fontSize=12;" value="DTO Response" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="50" width="140" x="540" y="650" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="snapshot" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#fff2cc;strokeColor=#d6b656;fontSize=11;dashed=1;" value="Snapshot
(optional optimization)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="65" width="170" x="200" y="370" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e1" edge="1" parent="1" source="cmd" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;strokeColor=#d6b656;" target="cmd_handler" value=""> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e2" edge="1" parent="1" source="cmd_handler" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;strokeColor=#d6b656;fontSize=10;" target="aggregate" value="load aggregate"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e3" edge="1" parent="1" source="aggregate" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;strokeColor=#9673a6;fontSize=10;" target="domain_events" value="emit"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e4" edge="1" parent="1" source="domain_events" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;strokeColor=#9673a6;fontSize=10;" target="event_store" value="append"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e5" edge="1" parent="1" source="event_store" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;dashed=1;fontSize=10;" target="projector" value="publish"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e6" edge="1" parent="1" source="projector" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;strokeColor=#82b366;fontSize=10;" target="read_store" value="update"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e7" edge="1" parent="1" source="qry_handler" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;strokeColor=#82b366;fontSize=10;" target="read_store" value="query"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e8" edge="1" parent="1" source="read_store" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;strokeColor=#82b366;" target="dto" value=""> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"> <Array as="points"> <mxPoint x="610" y="545" /> <mxPoint x="610" y="665" /> </Array> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e_snap" edge="1" parent="1" source="event_store" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;strokeColor=#d6b656;dashed=1;fontSize=10;" target="snapshot" value="replay / snapshot"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e_snap2" edge="1" parent="1" source="snapshot" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;strokeColor=#d6b656;dashed=1;fontSize=10;" target="aggregate" value="restore state"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"> <Array as="points"> <mxPoint x="285" y="200" /> <mxPoint x="567" y="200" /> </Array> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="legend_title" parent="1" style="text;html=1;strokeColor=none;fillColor=none;align=left;fontStyle=1;fontSize=11;" value="Legend" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="25" width="80" x="80" y="540" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="leg1" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffe6cc;strokeColor=#d6b656;fontSize=10;" value="Write Path" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="30" width="100" x="80" y="570" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="leg2" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#e1d5e7;strokeColor=#9673a6;fontSize=10;" value="Event Log" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="30" width="100" x="200" y="570" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="leg3" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#d5e8d4;strokeColor=#82b366;fontSize=10;" value="Read Path" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="30" width="100" x="320" y="570" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="leg4" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#fff2cc;strokeColor=#d6b656;fontSize=10;dashed=1;" value="Optional" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="30" width="100" x="80" y="610" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> </root> </mxGraphModel> </diagram> </mxfile>
